name: services.background-tasks
title: Services Background Tasks
description: The declaration to configure background tasks.

payloadkeys.title: Task Type
payloadkeys.content: The unique identifier of the set of background tasks managed with this configuration. This should be a reverse DNS style identifier. The system uses this identifier to differentiate between tasks in different configurations.

payloadkeys.title: Task Description
payloadkeys.content: A description of the set of background tasks managed by this configuration.

payloadkeys.title: Executable Asset Reference
payloadkeys.content:
Specifies the identifier of an asset declaration containing a reference to the files to be used for the background task configuration. The corresponding asset must be of type `com.apple.asset.data`.

The referenced data must be a zip archive of an entire directory, that will be expanded and stored in a well known location for the background task. The asset's "ContentType" and "Hash-SHA-256" keys in the "Reference" key are required.

This file should contain background task executables, scripts, and configuration files, but not the `launchd` configuration files.

payloadkeys.title: Launchd Configurations
payloadkeys.content: An array of `launchd` configuration files used to run the background tasks.

subkeys.title: File Asset Reference
subkeys.content: Specifies the identifier of an asset declaration containing a reference to the launchd configuration file for the background task. The referenced data must be a property list file conforming to the launchd.plist format. The asset's "ContentType" and "Hash-SHA-256" keys in the "Reference" key are required.

subkeys.title: Launchd Context
subkeys.content: Indicates whether the launchd configuration file is applied to the system daemon, or system agent domain.
